description_long: This research institute is a large, uniquely shaped building with a circular, segmented roof structure reminiscent of a spacecraft, set within a rectangular, landscaped plot. The building is surrounded by a perimeter fence and features extensive green lawns, mature trees, and several outdoor seating and gathering areas. The roof is flat and geometric, with multiple circular and rectangular elements, and the exterior walls are primarily gray, likely concrete or metal. The grounds include pathways, benches, gazebos, and small pavilions, providing spaces for outdoor activities and relaxation. The main entrance is located at the narrower end of the building, accessible via a paved walkway flanked by landscaping. The overall design is modern and futuristic, with a focus on both functionality and aesthetic appeal.
description: A large, circular, modern research institute with a segmented roof, surrounded by landscaped grounds, trees, and outdoor seating areas. The building features a futuristic design and is enclosed by a perimeter fence.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the circular building, extensive green lawns, and multiple trees and outdoor structures along the right side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, symmetrical landscaping, and several outdoor seating areas directly in front of the building.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the building's segmented roof, more outdoor pavilions, and a clear view of the perimeter fence and landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back entrance, a row of small trees, and a less densely landscaped area compared to the front.
attribute_entryway_design: The main entryway is located at the narrow end of the building, featuring a wide, flat approach with a paved walkway. The entrance is flanked by landscaping and small trees, and appears to have double doors, likely made of glass or metal, with no visible steps, suggesting accessibility. There are no prominent decorative elements or signage.
